Pagination

This component adds unsupported view for Tangora own list navigation. It actually replaces built-in navigation mergefield, while using its URL parameters to navigate through records (pagenumberXXX).

Requirements are to disable records auto-fetch and set fixed number of records to be shown at once. This number is important as it is passed to a component to make calculations (see data-page-size).

Examples (1)
Example Code
<as-pagination data-total="{x}" data-page-size="2" data-pageid="276" data-pagination-text="Page|of|from|records|Prev|Next"></as-pagination>
Properties (3)
Property name Description Type
data-total Required: this holds total number of records returned on list page from Overview > Main layout > Counter text > {x} value and should be typed as is data-total="{x}" number
data-page-size Required: this holds number of records per page and MUST match Overview > Main layout > Overview > Max. number per page value number
data-pagination-text Optional: pipe separated list of text with pagination info, defaults to "Page|of|from|records|Previous|Next" string
